AGREEMENTS.END_REACHED: YOU HAVE REACHED THE END OF THE AGREEMENT.
AGREEMENTS.INFO_END_REACHED: YOU HAVE REACHED THE END OF THE INFORMATION FORM.

CONTRACT_CONTENT.PARTIES_DESC: This Agreement is concluded between {{appName}} (hereinafter referred to as 'SELLER') and the user placing an order through this platform (hereinafter referred to as 'BUYER') within the framework of the following terms and conditions.
CONTRACT_CONTENT.SUBJECT_DESC: The subject of this Agreement is the determination of the rights and obligations of the parties in accordance with the Law on the Protection of Consumers No. 6502 and the Regulation on Distance Contracts regarding the sale and delivery of the product, the characteristics and sales price of which are specified below, ordered by the BUYER electronically via the SELLER's website.
CONTRACT_CONTENT.SELLER_DESC:
Title: {{appName}} E-Commerce Inc.
Address: Istanbul, Turkey
Email: support@ecommerce.com
CONTRACT_CONTENT.PRODUCT_DESC: The type, quantity, brand/model, sales price, and payment method of the product subject to the contract consist of the information at the time the order was finalized.
CONTRACT_CONTENT.DETAILS_DESC: ...Agreement details (Delivery Terms, Warranty and Return Conditions)...
CONTRACT_CONTENT.CLAUSE_5_1: 5.1. The BUYER declares that they have read the preliminary information about the basic characteristics, sales price, and payment method of the product subject to the contract and the delivery on the website and have given the necessary confirmation in the electronic environment.
CONTRACT_CONTENT.CLAUSE_5_2: 5.2. If the product subject to the contract is to be delivered to a person/organization other than the BUYER, the SELLER cannot be held responsible if the person/organization to be delivered does not accept the delivery.
CONTRACT_CONTENT.WITHDRAWAL_DESC: The BUYER has the right to withdraw from the contract by rejecting the goods without any legal or criminal responsibility and without giving any reason within 14 (fourteen) days from the date of receipt of the goods in distance contracts regarding the sale of goods.

INFO_CONTENT.PRODUCT_DESC: The type, quantity, brand and model, color, and sales price of the products including all taxes are as specified on the product introduction page on the website and in the order placed by the BUYER.
INFO_CONTENT.DELIVERY_DESC:
Payment method: Credit Card / Wallet
Delivery address: Address specified by the BUYER.
INFO_CONTENT.CLAUSE_3_1: 3.1. The SELLER is responsible for delivering the product subject to the contract in a sound, complete manner, in accordance with the qualifications specified in the order, and with warranty certificates and user manuals, if any.
INFO_CONTENT.COMPLAINT_DESC: The BUYER can convey their complaints about the goods and services they have purchased directly to the SELLER. If the complaint is conveyed, the SELLER will make every effort to resolve the problem.
